name: Merdeka Financial Group Limited
summary: Merdeka Financial Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the financial services, corporate consulting, trading, and information technology businesses in Hong Kong and the People Republic of China. The company's Financial Services Business segment provides securities brokerage, corporate finance advisory, asset management, money lending, and financial leasing services. Its Corporate Consulting Business segment offers company secretarial, accounting, and financial reporting services; and management consulting services. The company's Trading Business segment trades in goods, components, and accessories; and retails milk powder, dairy products, beauty and cosmetic products, and pharmaceutical OTC products. Its Information Technology Business segment engages in the distribution of information technology products, and provision of relevant technical support services. The company was formerly known as Merdeka Financial Services Group Limited and changed its name to Merdeka Financial Group Limited in October 2019. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Merdeka Financial Group Limited is a subsidiary of Team Sunny International Holdings Limited,
